evals.prompt: Show me the top-level classes in the CMSO ontology. I want to understand the overall hierarchy before I dive into specifics.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs class_browser.py with --list-roots to display all root-level CMSO classes, giving the user an overview of the ontology structure.
assertions: Invokes scripts/class_browser.py with --ontology cmso --list-roots --json
Output includes results.roots listing the top-level CMSO classes
Shows root classes like Material, Computational Sample, Structure, Unit Cell, etc.
Explains the hierarchy: root classes are broadest concepts, children are more specific

script_checks.description: class_browser --list-roots returns the CMSO root classes

evals.prompt: I'm working with crystal structures. What does the CMSO ontology say about the UnitCell class? Show me its children, parent classes, and any properties it has.
evals.expected_output: Agent inspects the UnitCell class and also looks up its properties, showing the class hierarchy path and applicable properties.
assertions: Invokes scripts/class_browser.py with --ontology cmso --class UnitCell --json
Invokes scripts/property_lookup.py with --ontology cmso --class UnitCell --json
Output includes class hierarchy (parent classes, children/subclasses)
Shows properties applicable to UnitCell (e.g., has Bravais lattice, lattice parameters)

script_checks.description: class_browser --class UnitCell resolves the canonical label and properties
property_lookup --class UnitCell lists all UnitCell properties with domain Unit Cell

evals.prompt: search for anything related to 'lattice' in CMSO - both classes and properties
evals.expected_output: Agent searches for lattice-related classes and properties across the CMSO ontology using the search functionality of both scripts.
assertions: Invokes scripts/class_browser.py with --ontology cmso --search lattice --json
Invokes scripts/property_lookup.py with --ontology cmso --search lattice --json
Returns matching classes (e.g., Lattice Parameter, Lattice Vector) with relevance scores
Returns matching properties (e.g., has Bravais lattice, has lattice parameter) with domain/range info

script_checks.description: class_browser --search lattice returns lattice classes with relevance scores
property_lookup --search lattice returns the two lattice properties with domain/range

evals.prompt: Look up the property 'has space group' in CMSO. I want to know its domain, range, and what type of property it is.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs property_lookup.py to get the full definition of the 'has space group' property including domain, range, and property type.
assertions: Invokes scripts/property_lookup.py with --ontology cmso --property 'has space group' --json
Output includes results.property_info with domain and range definitions
Identifies whether it is an object property or data property
Shows which class(es) the property applies to (domain) and what values it takes (range)

script_checks.description: property_lookup --property 'has space group' returns full property_info

evals.prompt: I have an OWL file at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OCDO/cmso/main/cmso.owl that I want to parse and generate a fresh summary JSON from. Can you do that?
evals.expected_output: Agent runs owl_parser.py to parse the remote OWL file, then ontology_summarizer.py to generate a summary JSON, noting this requires internet access.
assertions: Invokes scripts/owl_parser.py with --source https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OCDO/cmso/main/cmso.owl --json
Invokes scripts/ontology_summarizer.py with --source https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OCDO/cmso/main/cmso.owl --output summary.json --json
Mentions that internet access is required for fetching remote OWL files
Output from owl_parser includes results.metadata, results.classes, results.class_hierarchy

script_checks.description: owl_parser parses a local OWL fixture into metadata/classes/hierarchy
ontology_summarizer writes a summary JSON and reports statistics
